items.name: ANTIRTOS
items.description: Unleash your interrupts with an ultra-fast task manager, delivering tens of thousands of push/pull TPS even on simple MCUs. Interrupts stay blazing fast by enqueueing parameterized tasks instead of executing logic immediately. Whenever the program must wait, useful tasks run instead—eliminating blocking and dummy wait loops. The simplicity matter!
